purpose: Coordinator: derives admin-related UI state from MarmotContext and distributes it as props to presentational components (LeaveGroupButton, MemberList). Contains no MLS commit logic. Owns the handleMakeAdmin toast handler.
dependencies_allowed: MemberList (S4 seam: adminPubkeys, isCurrentUserAdmin, onMakeAdmin, pendingRemovalPubkeys, onCancelInvite gated on isAdmin)
dependencies_forbidden: grantAdminImpl (direct import — must go through MarmotContext.grantAdmin)

decisions.leave_vs_removal_badge: PendingRemoval has no cause field. All pending removals use leavePendingBadge. removalPendingBadge is reserved (not deleted) for a future cause-distinction increment.
decisions.error_mapping: All non-ok results from grantAdmin (closed codes + exhausted-retry raw messages) map to the single makeAdminError toast. No per-code branching in the UI.
